transcript: You afraid to talk to her? I'm not afraid to talk to her. I know you are, but what am I? Okay, just talk to her and find out. How do you tell if one's a rooster? Well, a rooster's bigger, longer feathers, and they've got that rubbery red stuff growing out of the top of their head. And around their neck, too. That shouldn't be too hard to spot.
